rows.label: qev060303_MSG0001
rows.name:
At this rate, it doesn't seem like I'll get
any Voltant even if I watch the shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060303_MSG0003
rows.name:
You're back.
Now, please return the Gorkwa to Troylan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060303_MSG0004
rows.name:
He's been trying to steal my Gorkwa,
and is experiencing slight withdrawal symptoms.[ST:wait ]
